title: ClassifyAxisAutoResult
description: Discriminated result: a recorded classification, or an LLM-tree hand-off.

_NeedsLlmTreeResult.description: Terminal shape E: the matcher abstained; the LLM decision tree decides.

needs_llm_tree.description: Discriminator: the AST matcher abstained (unclassifiable / function_not_found); nothing was recorded. The caller walks the LLM decision tree and records via the classify-axis primitive.
needs_llm_tree.title: Needs Llm Tree

source_path.description: Path to the source the LLM tree should read run_name's body from.
source_path.title: Source Path

run_signature_sha.description: The run's current signature hash — passed to the classify-axis recorder.
run_signature_sha.title: Run Signature Sha

evidence.description: The matcher's one-line evidence for why it abstained.
evidence.title: Evidence

tried.description: The ordered pattern checks the matcher walked before abstaining.
tried.title: Tried

_NeedsLlmTreeResult.title: _NeedsLlmTreeResult

_RecordedResult.description: Terminal shape A–D: a classification was recorded into axes.yaml.

recorded.description: Discriminator: the classification was recorded into .hpc/axes.yaml.
recorded.title: Recorded

classified_by.description: How the classification was reached: 'interview' (caller supplied data_axis), 'recall' (a prior similar experiment was reused), or 'agent' (the AST matcher classified it autonomously).
classified_by.title: Classified By

axes_path.description: Absolute path to the axes.yaml the entry was written into.
axes_path.title: Axes Path

_RecordedResult.title: _RecordedResult
